skills.label: Creative development and collaboration
skills.description: Practice and review: Creative Development. Topics include Program design and development; Collaboration; Documentation and testing.

skills.label: Data representation and analysis
skills.description: Practice and review: Data. Topics include Binary and data representation; Data compression; Extracting information from data.

skills.label: Algorithms and programming concepts
skills.description: Practice and review: Algorithms and Programming. Topics include Variables and algorithms; Control structures; Lists and procedures.

skills.label: Systems and networks
skills.description: Practice and review: Computing Systems and Networks. Topics include Internet structure; Fault tolerance; Protocols and packets.

skills.label: Impacts, ethics, and security
skills.description: Practice and review: Impact of Computing. Topics include Beneficial and harmful effects; Digital divide; Privacy and security.
